import {React, useEffect, useState} from 'react' import { Link, useParams } from 'react-router-dom' import axios from 'axios' export default function Category() { const {id} = useParams() const [category, setCategory] = useState([]) const [categoryProduct, setCategoryProduct] = useState([category]) useEffect(() => { if(id){ getIdData(id) getCategoryIdData(id) } }, [id]) const getIdData = async(id) => { const res = await axios.get(`http://localhost:1700/backend/category/${id}`) setCategory(res.data) // console.log('res:', res.data) } const getCategoryIdData = async(id) => { const res = await axios.get(`http://localhost:1700/backend/product/category/${id}`) const categoryData = res.data; setCategoryProduct(categoryData) console.log(categoryData); } return (
{category.category_name} 15 items
{categoryProduct.map((obj) => ( {obj.category_name} From ₹6990 ))} {/* Mobile Cables From ₹499 Apple iPhone 17 From ₹82,900 Monitors From ₹6599 Top Mirrorless Camera Shop Now! Fastrack Smartwatch From ₹1,399 Wireless Headphones Grab Now Printers From ₹2336 Wireless Headphones Grab Now Printers From ₹2336 */}
) }
